phase1.title: Phase 1 — Safety hardening
phase1.summary: Fail-closed trading gate, pending-order block, duplicate-run guard, order polling/reporting, and secret-hygiene tests are in place.

phase2.title: Phase 2 — Methodology robustness
phase2.summary: Closed-candle freshness, hysteresis/hold-period, churn/fee controls, orderbook checks, and walk-forward validation remain planned behind a disabled flag.
evidence: No live methodology change is active unless this flag is enabled.

phase3.title: Phase 3 — Reporting & governance
phase3.summary: Daily summary, governance status, dashboard schema, public UI cards, and dashboard publisher are active/reporting-only.

guardrails.capitalPolicy: full available Upbit account NAV; no fixed KRW cap
